abilities.name: 잠복
abilities.description: 교체로 나온 상대에게 2배 데미지로 공격할 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.
